templates.name: Basic Clicker
templates.description: A simple template that clicks on a target image repeatedly. Good for farming or other repetitive tasks.

templates.name: Form Filler
templates.description: Fills out a form with a username and password using variables. Replace placeholder images with your own.

templates.name: Image Hunter
templates.description: Finds and clicks a series of images in sequence. Useful for UI testing or multi-step processes.

templates.name: Data Extractor
templates.description: Uses OCR to extract text from a defined screen region and types it out. You must set the OCR region.

templates.name: Conditional Loop (Farming)
templates.description: Checks for a primary target (e.g., an enemy). If not found, it performs a fallback action (e.g., find new enemy) and retries.
